raw.subject: Your Lancaster page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you showcase your beautiful nail art collections through the photos on your Facebook page. Those intricate designs are stunning!

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving potential customers who prefer to book appointments online to search for other local salons.

I sketched up a simple idea for a homepage that incorporates the services you offer, a work gallery to showcase your nail art, and a clear booking CTA. You can see it here:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/diamonds-nail-salon-lancaster

If you're interested in learning more about how a simple website could work for your business, I'd be happy to discuss the details and provide a quote for a straightforward project.

Just reply to this email or give me a quick call to get started.
